infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to show clients your position during active bookings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to match you with nearby clients.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Background location is needed to track your position during active bookings.

foregroundService.notificationBody: Tracking your location for active booking

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow bSecure Guard to use your location to track position during active bookings.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow bSecure Guard to use your location in the background during active bookings.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow bSecure Guard to use your location to match you with nearby clients.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow bSecure Guard to access your photos for document uploads.
